title: Corrective fix for B-165b0761-review: Review takt init: commit scaffolded files to git after scaffold
description:
Blocked reason: Finding 1 (BLOCKING): tests/test_onboarding.py line 331 — `self.assertIn("--max-workers 3", yaml_text)` in TestGenerateConfigYaml.test_contains_runner. generate_config_yaml() only substitutes default_runner and test_command; max_workers is never written to the YAML, and default_config.yaml contains no --max-workers line. This assertion will always fail. Fix: either remove the assertion or (if the intent is to embed a max_workers reminder comment) update generate_config_yaml to inject one. The docs/onboarding.md design note says max_workers is intentionally NOT a config key, so the correct fix is to drop the assertion. Finding 2 (MINOR): docs/onboarding.md line 113 shows the .gitignore section header comment as `# orchestrator` but onboarding.py:591 writes `# takt`. Fix: change the example in docs to show `# takt`.

Remaining work: Two issues must be fixed before approval: (1) remove or correct the --max-workers assertion in test_contains_runner; (2) correct the gitignore comment example in docs/onboarding.md.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-165b0761-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
block_reason: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B-26b47b35-docs
conflict_risks: No file-scope conflicts — only onboarding.py, tests/test_onboarding.py, and docs/onboarding.md are in scope.
